summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a monster show highlighted by an epic Shakedown and tight second‑set jams
review: Fans rave about this 1985 Merriweather performance, calling the Shakedown “the mother of all Shakedowns” and praising standout moments like Mississippi Half‑Step, Keep on Growing, Cryptical Envelopment and The Other One. The soundboard recording is described as crisp and flawless, making the high‑energy setlist flow from a fun first set into a legendary second set.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently enthusiastic 4–5 star reviews praise both the musical performance and the flawless soundboard capture, with no negative comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp board mix; reviewers note no drop‑outs or balance issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A fun, upbeat first set leads into a monster second set with seamless transitions (Cryptical > Drums > Space > Other One) and high‑energy jams.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's keyboard/synth work on the Shakedown ending is highlighted as dramatic and a key part of the performance.
